title: Improvement Engine — Failure Classification, Backlog, Experimentation

tasks.title: Failure capture: classify root cause per failed agent run
Improvement backlog: auto-generate backlog item from failure
Skill/prompt/workflow patch proposer (low-risk → auto, high-risk → approval)
Before/after metrics tracking per agent skill change
Automated postmortem generator from failure timeline
Prompt versioning and A/B testing framework
